title: The Container Runtime Interface (CRI)
description: Analyze the interaction between kubelet, containerd, and low-level runtimes via the Container Runtime Interface (CRI). Evaluate different container runtimes (e.g., runc vs. Kata Containers) based on their isolation models and performance characteristics.
objectives: Analyze the interaction between kubelet, containerd, and low-level runtimes via the Container Runtime Interface (CRI).
Evaluate different container runtimes (e.g., runc vs. Kata Containers) based on their isolation models and performance characteristics.
